personal.name: Smit Faldu
personal.title: AI/ML Engineer
personal.summary: Specializing in Generative AI, LLMs, and Agentic AI systems. Building architectures that seamlessly bridge deterministic workflows and neural cognition.

points.title: Generative AI Pipeline Development
points.description: Designed and implemented LangChain & LangGraph based workflows to enable complex multi-agent reasoning and automation using RAG architecture.

points.title: Backend Services & Scalability
points.description: Built and deployed highly scalable FastAPI backend services integrated with GCP Cloud Run and Docker, minimizing latency in production workloads.

points.title: Vector DB Optimization
points.description: Optimized FAISS vector database retrieval and embeddings pipelines to significantly boost accuracy in large scale environments.

projects.title: AI Mock Pitch Agent
projects.description: An AI-driven voice agent to simulate startup pitch Q&A sessions. Built using LangChain+LangGraph workflows, FastAPI WebSockets, and ElevenLabs TTS.

projects.title: Founder-Investor Matrix
projects.description: AI matching engine connecting founders to investors via semantic search. Used FAISS vector database to retrieve the best matches contextually.

projects.title: ArXiv Research Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent research assistant built with AutoGen. Agents collaborate to retrieve, summarize, and query ArXiv academic papers seamlessly.

projects.title: DataAnalyzerAI
projects.description: Data exploration system interacting via natural language. Agents generate, execute, and return Python code to produce analysis automatically.
